_comment: Copy this to storage/key_value_stores/default/INPUT.json for local testing
_tasks: The agent handles both Notion and YouTube via natural language. Examples below:
_task_notion_only: List the 5 most recently edited pages in my Notion workspace
_task_youtube_to_notion: Search YouTube for clerk creators and append the top 10 channels to my Marketing Research page
task: Search YouTube for clerk creators and append the top 10 channels to my Marketing Research page
_llm: LiteLLM proxy at llm.scalekit.cloud — set llmBaseUrl for a different endpoint
_scalekit: Scalekit credentials are operator env vars — set SCALEKIT_ENV_URL, SCALEKIT_CLIENT_ID, SCALEKIT_CLIENT_SECRET in .env (local) or actor env var settings (Apify Console)
_youtube: youtubeIdentifier is the shared YouTube connected account — only needed for YouTube tasks
